risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Affecting Project Implementation
risk_summary: The project faces substantial political and governance risks that are constraining implementation progress. The downgrade from Satisfactory to Moderately Satisfactory ratings reflects accumulated implementation delays, suggesting governance fragility is impacting project execution capacity.
evidence_quote: The team downgraded PDO and IP ratings from Satisfactory to Moderately Satisfactory (MS) reflecting accumulated implementation delays in the project.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints for Digital Government Implementation
risk_summary: Substantial institutional capacity risks persist in implementing digital government services. Zero progress on key government digitalization indicators (MDAs utilizing shared services, G2C/G2B services developed, e-Cabinet/e-Parliament systems) suggests governance institutions lack capacity to operationalize digital systems, a core FCV concern in fragile states.
evidence_quote: MDAs utilizing shared services operationalized by the project (Number) Actual (Current): 0 13-Jan-2025... G2C/G2B Digital Government Services developed (Number) Actual (Current): 0 13-Jan-2025

risk_title: Governance Capacity Risk in Spectrum Management and Critical Infrastructure Protection
risk_summary: The government has not yet established spectrum management systems or operationalized the National CIRT despite project support. These are critical governance functions; delays suggest institutional fragility in managing essential digital infrastructure and regulatory functions.
evidence_quote: Spectrum Management and Monitoring System Established (Yes/No) Actual (Current): No 13-Jan-2025... National CIRT operational (Yes/No) Actual (Current): No 13-Jan-2025
